feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: code-review
entry.content: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring

entry.title: biorxiv
entry.content: Access to bioRxiv and medRxiv preprint data. The bioRxiv Connector gives Claude access to bioRxiv and medRxiv preprint servers, hosting research papers in biological and medical sciences posted before peer review.

entry.title: claude-code-setup
entry.content: Analyze codebases and recommend tailored Claude Code automations such as hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.

entry.title: signalos
entry.content: SignalOS — Product Operating System. Governance-first delivery operating system with gated waves, trust tiers, validators, and audit trail.

entry.title: learning-output-style
entry.content: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points (mimics the unshipped Learning output style)

entry.title: open-targets
entry.content: Drug target discovery and prioritisation platform. The Open Targets Platform is a comprehensive tool that supports systematic identification and prioritisation of potential therapeutic drug targets, integrating publicly available datasets to build and score target-disease associations.

entry.title: ruby-lsp
entry.content: Ruby language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: design-systems
entry.content: Build, document, and maintain scalable design systems — from tokens and components to accessibility and theming.

entry.title: ux-strategy
entry.content: Shape product direction through competitive analysis, design principles, experience mapping, and strategic alignment.

entry.title: adisinsight
entry.content: AdisInsight MCP server by Springer Nature for drug development pipeline, clinical trials, and deals intelligence

entry.title: plugin-dev
entry.content: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance

entry.title: pr-review-toolkit
entry.content: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

entry.title: gitlab
entry.content: GitLab DevOps platform integration. Manage repositories, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, issues, and wikis. Full access to GitLab's comprehensive DevOps lifecycle tools.

entry.title: swift-lsp
entry.content: Swift language server (SourceKit-LSP) for code intelligence

entry.title: gopls-lsp
entry.content: Go language server for code intelligence and refactoring

entry.title: firebase
entry.content: Google Firebase MCP integration. Manage Firestore databases, authentication, cloud functions, hosting, and storage. Build and manage your Firebase backend directly from your development workflow.

entry.title: terraform
entry.content: The Terraform MCP Server provides seamless integration with Terraform ecosystem, enabling advanced automation and interaction capabilities for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development.

entry.title: pubmed
entry.content: PubMed MCP server for searching biomedical literature and research articles

entry.title: pm-cs
entry.content: Customer Success skills: Customer Health Scorecard, QBR Deck, Escalation Brief, Churn Analysis. Score account health with a weighted RAG framework, build structured QBR decks with value narratives, write crisp escalation briefs for at-risk accounts, and analyse churn by category and segment with prioritised interventions.

entry.title: knowbe4
entry.content: Claude plugins for KnowBe4 - security awareness training, phishing simulation, user risk management

entry.title: agentguard
entry.content: Dense orchestration diagnostics for Claude Code sessions and traces

entry.title: mcp-debugger
entry.content: Multi-language debugging plugin for Claude Code using Debug Adapter Protocol. Debug JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Go, and Rust with real breakpoints, stepping, and variable inspection.

entry.title: neostack-connect
entry.content: Connect Claude Code to a running NeoStackAI Unreal editor session.

entry.title: telegram-sessions
entry.content: Multi-session Telegram channel for Claude Code — daemon-based architecture with session routing, /new, /sessions, /kill commands from Telegram.

entry.title: skills-ontology
entry.content: Intelligent skill management and retrieval for Claude Code

entry.title: tool-usage-tracker
entry.content: Log Skill, Agent, and slash-command invocations to a local JSONL file and report on usage over time.

entry.title: synaxi-predict
entry.content: Predicts cost, turns, and pass rate for Claude Code tasks before they run

entry.title: realm
entry.content: Obsidian project-knowledge pipeline. Six-skill system: realm-forge (bootstrap), realm-phase (scan+stage), realm-manifest (write), realm-flourish (incremental update), realm-convey (conversation capture), realm-recall (query). Dry-run safety boundary before vault writes. realm-convey bridges conversation context into the pipeline via user-selected topic routing.

entry.title: agent-learning-compounder
entry.content: Distills repo facts, session telemetry, and skill-health signals into durable, evidence-backed agent memory.

entry.title: socrates
entry.content: Know Your Self — session alias manager (/socrates skill + socrates CLI) and settings/harness dashboard (map/report) for Claude Code

entry.title: raiola
entry.content: Repo-native workflow OS and portable skill pack for explicit spec, plan, build, verify, review, and ship flows.

entry.title: frontend-craft
entry.content: Shared Claude Code plugin for frontend teams, including frontend skills, subagents, hooks, and MCP integration for Figma/Sketch/MasterGo/Pixso/墨刀/摹客. All reports auto-saved as Markdown files.

entry.title: rpikit
entry.content: rpikit — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: recursica-knowledge
entry.content: Skills and component specifications for component selection, design token application, and component implementation in Recursica.

entry.title: decidalo-agent
entry.content: Decidalo Sales Profile export pipeline — fetches IT-consultant profiles from the Decidalo platform, enriches project metadata, optionally tailors text to a target customer, standardizes formatting, and renders Word .docx Sales Profile templates.

entry.title: wrangler
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, testing gates, subagent parallelization, etc.

entry.title: flow
entry.content: Opinionated 5-phase development lifecycle for Claude Code — language-agnostic, repo-local bin/* delegation

entry.title: agent-ready-repo
entry.content: Keeps agent-facing repository memory layered, current, and maintainable across AGENTS.md, monorepos, docs, skills, agents, hooks, CLI, and MCP surfaces.

entry.title: ebay-cli-skill
entry.content: Shop, sell, and ship on eBay via the ebay CLI — search items, compare prices, manage orders, print shipping labels

entry.title: unsevered-memory
entry.content: Persistent memory system for Claude Code with enforced context

entry.title: copilots-swarm
entry.content: Bernardo's Copilots Swarm plugin for Claude

entry.title: semia
entry.content: Representation Synthesis workflow for auditing agent skills in Claude Code.

entry.title: karpathy-wiki
entry.content: Skills for managing a twillm wiki — setup, daily operations, health checks, and description generation.

entry.title: claude-player
entry.content: Plays elevator music in the background while Claude Code is thinking. Random non-repeat track rotation, OS-aware playback, /claude-player:music slash controls, and an optional now-playing status line.

entry.title: biosymphony-structure-factory
entry.content: BioSymphony Structure Factory skills for public-safe structural biology campaign planning.

entry.title: tower
entry.content: Live conversation mirror - tail session transcripts in a split pane

entry.title: gdscript-lsp
entry.content: GDScript (Godot Engine) language server for Claude Code. Bridges Godot's built-in TCP LSP to stdio and auto-launches the editor headless when needed.

entry.title: claude-code-organizer
entry.content: Organize all your Claude Code memories, skills, MCP servers, and hooks — view by scope hierarchy, move between scopes via drag-and-drop

entry.title: neo-skills
entry.content: Neo Skills: 通用專家代理人技能套件，提供 .NET、Azure Pipelines、程式碼審查、Git 工作流程與 Swift/Python 開發支援

entry.title: code-to-prd
entry.content: Reverse-engineer any codebase into a complete Product Requirements Document (PRD). Analyzes routes, components, models, APIs, and interactions for frontend (React, Vue, Angular, Next.js), backend (NestJS, Django, Express, FastAPI), and fullstack applications.

entry.title: data-quality-auditor
entry.content: Audit datasets for completeness, consistency, accuracy, and validity. 3 stdlib-only Python tools: data profiler with DQS scoring, missing value analyzer with MCAR/MAR/MNAR classification, and multi-method outlier detector.

entry.title: building-secure-contracts
entry.content: Comprehensive smart contract security toolkit based on Trail of Bits' Building Secure Contracts framework. Includes vulnerability scanners for 6 blockchains and 5 development guideline assistants.

entry.title: safety-net
entry.content: Block destructive shell commands before execution. Prevents rm -rf, git push --force, docker system prune, kubectl delete, terraform destroy, cloud deletions (AWS/GCP/Azure), database drops, and 200+ dangerous patterns.

entry.title: abstract
entry.content: Meta-skills infrastructure for Claude Code plugin ecosystem - skill authoring, hook development, modular design patterns, and evaluation frameworks

entry.title: agent-look
entry.content: Scan your screengrabs folder for recent screenshots, preview before loading, and auto-rename generic filenames with descriptive names. Bypasses iCloud TCC restrictions via Spotlight.

entry.title: macrodata
entry.content: Stateful agent tools for Claude Code. Learns who you are, remembers what you're working on, schedules tasks, maintains itself.

entry.title: aport-guardrails
entry.content: APort Agent Guardrails — security policy enforcement for every tool call. Intercepts tool use, evaluates against your passport policy, and blocks unauthorized actions.

entry.title: cost-monitor
entry.content: Claude Code cost observability plugin. Aggregates token usage and cost from local transcript JSONL (~/.claude/projects/), with optional ccusage CLI integration. Provides statusLine helper script (manual settings.json wiring required), per-period dashboard generation (daily/weekly/monthly), per-model breakdown, cache hit rate analysis, and sanitized --export output for sharing. Read-only and side-effect-free; no API calls.

entry.title: claude-dev-assistant
entry.content: 个性化开发助手工作流 - 苏格拉底访谈、双Agent辩论、专家团队、RAG设计

entry.title: quality-playbook
entry.content: AI code review catches structural issues — null derefs, leaks, races — about 65% of real defects. The other 35% are intent violations: bugs only catchable when you know what the code is supposed to do. Quality Playbook derives behavioral requirements from your codebase AND your docs (specs, issues, chat history), then drives a six-phase review against them. Finds the bugs that look right but aren't.

entry.title: dos-kernel
entry.content: The kernel is the part that doesn't believe the agents. Bundles the DOS hooks (verify-on-stop, deny-a-refused-call, re-surface-a-stalled-stream), the DOS MCP server (verify / arbitrate / refuse-with-a-reason as tools), and the generic skill pack — one install. Requires the `dos-kernel` Python package: pip install 'dos-kernel[mcp]'.

entry.title: almedia-code
entry.content: Token-optimized Claude Code bootstrap: 17 agents, 23 commands (incl. /plan-execute Review→Fix→Docs flow with --team mode), 13 skills (incl. Freecash design system), 5 output styles, 2 hooks. Reviewers enforce surgical-edits + readability principles (R1–R8 + Rule of 3 DRY).

entry.title: pixelbin
entry.content: Production media pipelines in Claude — 85+ AI APIs, 60+ URL transformations, CDN, DAM. Generate images and videos, transform via URL, build SEO landing pages with your brand's design system.

entry.title: arcgentic
entry.content: Agentic harness for rigorous round-driven development with external audit, closeout gates, and V2 fixed-role session orchestration.

entry.title: eliniscan
entry.content: AI-powered full codebase scanner. Opens a separate Claude session for every file — reads every line, misses nothing. Finds bugs, security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and auto-fixes them.

entry.title: kuzushi-security-plugin
entry.content: Local-first vulnerability confirmation and remediation pipeline for Claude Code: context, x-ray, PASTA threat model, CVE threat-intel, SAST/taint, invariant testing, adversarial hunting, memory exploitability, fuzz proof, rule synthesis, SARIF, and PoC⁺ patch validation behind a hardened policy plane. Operates on source you have on disk, with no hosted service, live target, proxy, or traffic capture.

entry.title: viralman
entry.content: Local dashboard + multi-platform poster + gitmail outreach. Writes non-AI-feeling promo posts for Reddit / X / LinkedIn, and runs targeted email campaigns to stargazers of similar GitHub repos — all under the user's own accounts with explicit permission.

entry.title: speak
entry.content: Simple, cross-platform, and low-latency TTS. Hear your agent's responses.

entry.title: designer-notes
entry.content: Figma-style feedback commenting for AI-generated UI. Pin comments to HTML elements in the browser, then hand off structured feedback to Claude Code for implementation.

entry.title: agent-slack
entry.content: Slack CLI tool for AI agents - replaces MCP Slack tools with a token-efficient CLI

entry.title: anysite-skills
entry.content: Professional skills for data extraction and analysis using anysite MCP server. Covers LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, Y Combinator, SEC, and web scraping for lead generation, competitive intelligence, market research, social media analytics, person intelligence, VC analysis, and competitor research.

entry.title: pakka
entry.content: Claude Code harness — fewer tokens, fewer bugs, audit-ready. Apache-2.0.

entry.title: ayanokoji
entry.content: Strategic execution protocol. Front-loads intelligence, plans before acting, enforces verification before completing.

entry.title: aman-claude-code
entry.content: The complete AI companion plugin for Claude Code. Auto-loads your identity, memory, tools, workflows, guardrails, and skills — every session, zero setup.

entry.title: charter
entry.content: Know the project + own the owner relationship. At SessionStart, a compact proportional brief that gates substantive work on the project's Claude-facing docs: quality attributes (Lighthouse-aligned for web), a project map (file→responsibility index, for blast radius), recorded decisions/ADRs (the alignment anchor — don't reverse without consulting), a roadmap/backlog, stack notes, and the project's established conventions (reuse before create) — generating them from code/git when missing and going quiet once they're summarised in CLAUDE.md (claude-companion marker). Surfaces outcome memory — "scar tissue": files this project has REPEATEDLY had to FIX, derived from git history by the rework ratio (fix/revert commits over total touching a file), not raw churn — so the review loop treats debt magnets as high-risk (understand why they churn, cover them, prefer the smallest change, or simplify an over-built abstraction) before extending them; surfaced even in quiet mode (it's state, not policy), silent on a clean/new repo. Owns the non-technical owner loop: confirm intent in plain language → demonstrate the result back → recap. Adds an alignment floor — a bounded Stop hook (the outcome-time complement to the review loop's intent-time alignment): when a finished change plausibly bears on a recorded decision (a dependency manifest / config / migration changed, or a backtick-fenced decision token appears in the diff), it blocks once and puts the recorded decisions in front of the model — honor them, or, if the change reverses/contradicts one, surface that to the owner in plain language and confirm before it lands. Silent on routine edits and on projects with no recorded decisions; bounded (≤ CLAUDE_CHARTER_ALIGN_MAX blocks/session, never twice for the same tree) so it can't loop; disable with CLAUDE_CHARTER_ALIGN_GATE=0. /charter:align reconciles open/proposed work against recorded decisions + roadmap on demand (clean ≠ correct). Action-time consent for consequential/irreversible operations is enforced natively (settings.json auto mode + deny/ask rules), not a charter hook. MCP reachability probe: a second SessionStart hook checks that the MCP servers DECLARED for this project (merged read-only from ~/.claude.json, .mcp.json, and .claude/settings*.json) actually respond — briefly spawning each stdio server for the MCP initialize handshake and POSTing it to each http/sse endpoint, every probe hard-bounded by a per-server timeout and run in parallel — so the silent failure mode (a mis-installed/unreachable server whose tools just never appear) is surfaced to a non-technical owner in plain language; an HTTP auth challenge counts as reachable (not down), only a fresh start probes (not compact/resume), self-disables when no servers are declared, never blocks, and disables with CLAUDE_CHARTER_MCP_PROBE=0. Read-only over the project — it detects and the model authors the docs.

entry.title: archcore
entry.content: Make your AI agent code with your project's architecture, rules, and decisions.

entry.title: get-stuff-done
entry.content: Structured build pipeline — interview, spec, roadmap, per-phase plan+execute, goal-backward verify. Trigger on "build", "let's build", "spec this", "scope this", "new feature". Supports --auto, --chain.

entry.title: rx-claude-matrix-bridge
entry.content: Matrix as a Claude Code Channel. Always-on Matrix daemon + per-TUI MCP relay. Per-session room routing via link_chat tool. Headless `claude --print --resume` fallback for offline TUIs so messages never get lost.

entry.title: conjure
entry.content: Intelligent delegation framework for routing tasks to external LLM services while retaining strategic oversight

entry.title: citecheck
entry.content: Pertinence review for \cite references in LaTeX research documents: parallel haiku scoring against InspireHEP and arXiv abstracts to flag mistakenly inserted or hallucinated citations.

entry.title: sdlc-skills
entry.content: A bundled software delivery lifecycle toolkit for Claude Code: role-based agents (BA, Tech Lead, PM, Python dev, JS dev, QA, Personal Assistant) and composable skills (bug-fix workflow, feature planning, feature implementation, project seeding, code review, TDD, and more). Use when orchestrating an AI development team or when you want structured SDLC workflows inside a single project.

entry.title: ai-brainmap
entry.content: Live Context Visualizer for Claude Code — watch Claude think in real time as an interactive 2D/3D mindmap. Every prompt, tool call and response becomes a glowing node; the tree grows additively as Claude works.

entry.title: julie
entry.content: Code intelligence server: search, navigation, and refactoring across 34 languages

entry.title: epistemic-skills
entry.content: Research-discipline skills for Claude Code: bootstrap empirical sessions, turn ideas into falsifiable hypotheses, pre-register experiments, reproduce baselines, run studies, attack results, and decide kill-or-ship. An add-on that pairs with the Epistemic OMP agent.

entry.title: doctor-who-sounds
entry.content: Doctor Who sound effects for Claude Code session events

entry.title: ddd-workflow
entry.content: Document Driven Development — a structured workflow for AI-assisted software development with TDD, specs, and cross-review

entry.title: hud
entry.content: A consolidated status line for the companion plugins, scoped to the signals a status line is the best surface for: a static health beacon (green/yellow/red), paused state, agent-mode, the verification floor’s ✓/✗ tests result, the count of unanswered open questions (❓N) you still owe an answer on, a coupling-rising indicator (🔗↑, shown only when tidy's last verify saw import density climbing — a cached read, never computed on render), context-window fill % (how close to a compaction, color-ramped), running session cost ($, from the payload, hidden at zero), git branch + uncommitted-file count + unpushed/unpulled commit counts (↑ahead ↓behind vs the branch's upstream — the committed-but-not-pushed companion to the dirty count), and model — rendered read-only from existing plugin state and the statusLine payload. Deliberately doesn't re-render signals already shown elsewhere (the task list Claude Code renders natively; docs-health charter nudges at session start; last tidy action) — that was duplication, and the docs mirror was the heaviest cross-plugin maintenance burden. Sets no refreshInterval: the beacon is static, so event-driven updates keep it fresh without waking jq+git on an idle timer (battery-friendly). Run /hud:setup once to wire it into settings.json with a version-resilient command (survives updates). No hooks, no scanning, zero model-token cost.

entry.title: membase
entry.content: Persistent memory and wiki workflows for Claude Code.

entry.title: forge-skills
entry.content: Agentic Engineering toolkit — 42 skills, 13 agent personas, 36 slash commands. Full UI chain (brand → design-system → components → pages → dataviz → polish) plus motion-system reference. forge:meta uses generated_from hash snapshots so upstream edits cascade zero downstream writes. /sync + /forge-migrate + /feedback + bin/forge-check.sh. TDD-tested skills.

entry.title: claude-net
entry.content: Agent coordination network — prevents conflicts between multiple Claude Code tabs and agents via file-based IPC

entry.title: claude-statusline
entry.content: Always-visible statusline for Claude Code — context, git, tokens, cost. Rust binary, zero dependencies.

entry.title: claude-tracker
entry.content: Auto-track every Claude Code project: session counts, prompt counts, last-active times, per-project metadata. Pairs with the Claude Tracker desktop dashboard.

entry.title: nvim-aware-claude
entry.content: Make Claude Code aware of a running Neovim session: live current file, cursor, selection, search, quickfix list, windows, and buffers.

entry.title: ccstatus
entry.content: Claude Code statusline with cost tracking (daily/weekly/monthly), burn rate, budget bar, git context, PR status, and session timer

entry.title: gcenv
entry.content: Per-terminal and per-Claude-session GCP profile isolation. Switch gcloud accounts/projects/ADC without clobbering other tabs or Claude sessions.

entry.title: tidy
entry.content: Tidy-as-you-touch: when you edit a file, format it and surface linter findings — fixing what's safe — flag it for decomposition when it grows past a size budget, and hold a subtractive posture (reuse before create, delete what a change makes redundant) so an actively-worked project trends down in complexity over time, scoped to the file you touched. The standard goes quiet (one-line re-anchor) once it's recorded in the project's CLAUDE.md. Edit-time linting targets Go (goimports/gofumpt + golangci-lint), web (eslint incl. jsx-a11y, stylelint), Python (ruff) and shell (shellcheck) — findings-only, the project's own tool, fast file-scoped tools only (slow whole-project linters stay with the verification floor). It surfaces an approximate blast-radius of the touched file (Go via the toolchain's exact go list importer graph, cached per session, falling back to git grep; else git grep) so a change's affected surface gets test coverage. A Stop hook is the verification floor: after Claude finishes, if the working tree changed and the project has a discoverable test command, it runs the tests and blocks until they pass (bounded) — the safety net a non-technical owner can't produce. After a change verifies clean, the same Stop hook surfaces the deliberate whole-project prune when debt crosses a threshold (over-budget files past CLAUDE_TIDY_PRUNE_THRESHOLD, default 3) — a weight report recommending a subtractive pass (dead code, duplication, doc gaps), throttled to once per debt episode, with any cuts routed through the task-queue review loop; no manual command. Coverage ratchet: when a touched source file has no test, nudge to characterize it before changing; opt-in strict mode (CLAUDE_TIDY_COVERAGE_RATCHET=1) blocks the stop until changed source is characterized. Regression gate (always-on, narrow): the same Stop hook blocks when a changed file is BOTH a scar-tissue hotspot (one git history shows has been repeatedly FIXED — mirrors charter's outcome-memory detector, drift-guarded) AND still has no test — a fix to a proven debt-magnet can silently regress, so it must be pinned by a regression test before finishing. Safe to keep on by default because it only fires on files that have earned it and goes quiet the moment a test lands (closing the loop charter's scar-tissue detection opens); bounded like the test floor (can't loop), disable with CLAUDE_TIDY_REGRESSION_GATE=0, and stands down when the broad coverage ratchet is already forcing. Quality floor: before the tests, the same Stop hook enforces the project's OWN declared quality gates beyond its test command — typecheck, a11y/perf, and architecture/dependency rules, discovered as package.json scripts (npm/pnpm/yarn) — running detect-and-run (installs/invents nothing; heavy Lighthouse/CWV audits stay in CI) and blocking until they pass, bounded like the test floor; disable with CLAUDE_TIDY_QUALITY_FLOOR=0. Clean-architecture check (zero owner config): after a clean verify it also surfaces any import CYCLE that involves a file changed this turn — detect-and-run the project's own madge (no bespoke resolver; silent without it; Go/Rust cycles are compiler errors the floor already catches), non-blocking and content-deduped per session, disable with CLAUDE_TIDY_CYCLE_CHECK=0. Coupling-density trend: the same post-green surface nudges when import-edges-per-file (a size-normalized coupling proxy, so healthy growth doesn't false-alarm) climbs past a threshold vs the last check — turning 'watch total coupling' into a measured signal; per-repo baseline, non-blocking, disable with CLAUDE_TIDY_COUPLING_TREND=0.

entry.title: domain-names
entry.content: Manage domains from Claude Code — check availability, register, configure DNS, and more via the dn CLI

entry.title: software-engineering-skills
entry.content: Multi-agent engineering pipeline: REFINE, PLAN, BUILD, TEST, REVIEW. Orchestrates end-to-end feature development with TDD, incremental builds, and code health improvement. Language-agnostic.

entry.title: language-tutor
entry.content: Local-first language tutor for Claude Code

entry.title: choomfie
entry.content: Personal AI agent channel for Claude Code — Discord bridge with persistent memory, skills, and personality.

entry.title: optym-code
entry.content: Cut Claude Code costs 20-55%. Smart model routing (Sonnet default, Opus only when needed) + terse output compression. Open source.

entry.title: exodia
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow orchestration: 9 commands (fix, turbo-fix, fix-pipeline, tournament, mega-swarm, deep-think, batch-implement, red-blue-review, baryon-mode) + 2 skills (eight-gates, hades).

entry.title: askq
entry.content: Renders AskUserQuestion as a native GUI window (Tauri/WKWebView) instead of the in-terminal picker, and injects the answer back via updatedInput. Also exposes an ask_user_question MCP tool. macOS.

entry.title: quietclash
entry.content: Detect silent behavioral merge conflicts between parallel coding agents — branches that merge cleanly and pass tests but are behaviorally incompatible.

entry.title: imessage
entry.content: Give Claude access to your iMessage history so it can search your conversations, tell you who you should text back, analyze how your friendships are trending, and surface patterns from years of messages — all with a privacy layer so you control exactly what it sees.

entry.title: smooth-brain
entry.content: Switch Claude Code between concise response styles with wrinkled, bumpy, and smooth presets.

entry.title: metacognitive-guard
entry.content: Cognitive amplification stack: epistemic hooks, competitive review, commit integrity checks, CI verification scripts, and deep-thinking agents.

entry.title: cgc-guard
entry.content: cgc (Code Graph Context) 連携プラグイン。コード編集前の影響範囲確認（context+impact）を PreToolUse ゲートで強制し、編集・git 操作のたびに graph へ差分を自動適用（detached・冪等・SessionStart バックストップ付き）。git リポなら .cgc 無しでも MCP 起動時に自動インデックスで参加（.cgc-disabled でオプトアウト）。非 git フォルダでは no-op。

entry.title: swarm-discussion
entry.content: Claude adapter for swarm-discussion: the parent projects per-topic custom expert agents, dispatches a swarm-coordinator background session that runs the multi-expert discussion over the vendored host-agnostic runtime and spawns those experts, and returns only the synthesis. Keeps discussion mechanics out of the parent context window.

entry.title: acdp-browser
entry.content: acdp (Browser/CDP) の MCP 提供プラグイン。Playwright MCP 互換の browser_* ツールでブラウザを直接操作（UI 動作確認・E2E）。/ui-test スキルと ui-tester エージェントを同梱。headless / headed / extension（Chrome 拡張経由でログイン済み実ブラウザを操作）の 3 モードを .acdp.json / ACDP_MODE で切り替え可能（/acdp-mode スキル同梱）。acdp バイナリ不在の環境では 0 tools で静かに無効化（.acdp-disabled で PJ 単位オプトアウト）。

entry.title: free-text
entry.content: Free-text session notes: a statusLine note/queue + stats preview and /free-text:* commands, sharing ~/.free-text with the Oh My Pi plugin.

entry.title: ac
entry.content: Structured development partner for Claude Code. Plans before coding, investigates bugs with hypothesis discipline, delegates to specialized agents.

entry.title: pslog-workflow
entry.content: pslog로 관리되는 프로젝트에서 할당된 task를 무게에 맞는 준비 문서(brief 또는 spec→plan)로 탄탄하게 실현하고, 각 단계마다 사람 승인을 받는 워크플로 스킬.

entry.title: visual-companion
entry.content: Unified Chrome-App-Window mit Live-Pointer-Debugging für Web-App-Entwicklung. Alt+Click im Browser-Pane → Claude kennt das Element (DOM, Styles, Screenshot, Source-Map, Ancestors).

entry.title: autoresearch-agent
entry.content: Autonomous experiment loop that optimizes any file by a measurable metric. 5 slash commands, 8 evaluators, configurable loop intervals (10min to monthly).

entry.title: cowork-codex
entry.content: Use host Codex from Claude Cowork to review code or delegate tasks.

entry.title: hyrex
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: adtention
entry.content: Ad-supported status line for Claude Code: a genuinely useful dev status line (model, context %, weekly limit) plus one sponsor slot, targeted locally by category. Devs earn credit per impression; only a category tag ever leaves the machine.

entry.title: skillless
entry.content: Auto-discovery plugin for Claude Code skills - automatically recommends and installs relevant capabilities without users needing to know about skills

entry.title: agntux-build
entry.content: Build a new AgntUX plugin for a tool AgntUX doesn't support yet. It guides you step by step — no coding needed.

entry.title: semantic-search
entry.content: Semantic codebase search — natural language queries over code and docs using embeddings, tree-sitter parsing, and POEM multi-signal ranking

entry.title: plan-todo-workflow
entry.content: Run PLAN.md, TODO.md, and TESTING.md as a gated long-running agent workflow.

entry.title: trigger-my-training
entry.content: A ground-first reflex: the agent judges (from its own training, any domain) when a request is complex/irreversible, grounds before acting, and is hard-blocked from the destructive step until it has.

entry.title: telegram-notify
entry.content: Send and schedule Telegram messages from Claude Code via Bot API — instant or delayed delivery via Cloudflare Worker

entry.title: claude-canvas
entry.content: AI-orchestrated visual production for Obsidian Canvas. Create presentations, flowcharts, mood boards, knowledge graphs, and galleries with intelligent layout and AI-generated content.

entry.title: ix-flow
entry.content: Run and author Agent IX workflows from Claude: a generic /ix-flow runner and an /ix-flow-create authoring skill.

entry.title: claude-obsidian
entry.content: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern). v1.7 "Compound Vault" + v1.8 methodology modes close 5 of 5 priority gaps from the May 2026 compass artifact. Ships: substrate alignment with kepano/obsidian-skills, default Obsidian CLI transport, hybrid retrieval (contextual prefix + BM25 + cosine rerank per Anthropic's Sept 2024 research), per-file advisory locking for multi-writer safety, pre-commit verifier agent, AND methodology modes (LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten / Generic) for first-class organizational support no other Claude+Obsidian competitor offers. v1.7.x audit closure: every BLOCKER + HIGH + MEDIUM + LOW finding from the v1.7.0 audit is CLOSED or DEFERRED-with-rationale. Optional DragonScale Memory extension (log folds, deterministic addresses, semantic tiling lint, boundary-first autoresearch).

entry.title: oss
entry.content: Ship with confidence. Every time. Complete development lifecycle from idea to production.

entry.title: plan-todo-workflow
entry.content: Run PLAN.md, TODO.md, and TESTING.md as a gated long-running agent workflow.

entry.title: rpi
entry.content: Research → Propose → Plan → Implement → Verify workflow for Claude Code. Spec-driven development with persistent artifacts under .rpi/.

entry.title: cc-budget
entry.content: Track session token/USD spend against a configurable budget, plan work to fit it, and keep Claude Code within budget.

entry.title: screen-mcp
entry.content: Eyes and hands on a Linux Wayland desktop: screenshot any monitor and click, type, scroll, drag, and read any visible app over xdg-desktop-portal (RemoteDesktop + ScreenCast), with optional OCR + OmniParser icon grounding. Pure-Python, CPU-only. GNOME/Wayland only. Ships the MCP server plus a drive-screen skill that encodes the locate-ground-act-confirm loop.

entry.title: don-cheli-sdd
entry.content: Full SDD (Spec-Driven Development) framework for Claude Code. 72+ slash commands (/dc:*), 14 reusable skills, 15 reasoning models, TDD as an iron law, and i18n support (ES/EN/PT). Turn requirements into tested, documented, production-ready code through 7 disciplined lifecycle phases.

entry.title: maestro
entry.content: Complete Maestro framework - 14 domain agents, 80+ subagents, 100+ helper scripts for WordPress, SEO, hosting, code quality, browser automation, and more

entry.title: agentic-seo
entry.content: Agentic SEO Skills adds project brains, data-backed SEO analysis, content workflows, and technical SEO checks to Agentic SEO.

entry.title: relaywash
entry.content: Clean agent tool output, lower token burn. Replaces Claude Code's built-in file/shell tools with structured equivalents.

entry.title: tailwindcss-lsp
entry.content: Tailwind CSS language server for Claude Code via tailwind-lsp-adapter

entry.title: skill-memo
entry.content: Claude Code skill and MCP server catalog with memo — manage, search, tag, and export your installed tools

entry.title: cooktap
entry.content: Terminal typing micro-game — practice while the AI cooks

entry.title: iterate-team
entry.content: agent team 並列マルチエージェント・ハーネス。要望文から計画を作成し、独立タスクを git worktree で分離して並列実装、検収は Evaluator 先行→APPROVED 後に Code Review の逐次ゲート、PR を自動作成する。言語・スタック非依存。

entry.title: os-control-mcp
entry.content: The sanctioned OS 'motor cortex' for an agent on a Linux box: control systemd services/timers, query journald, read host resources/processes, send desktop notifications, drive D-Bus, and manage power (suspend/reboot/poweroff) — all through structured interfaces (systemctl/loginctl/journalctl/busctl), never raw PID hacks. Pure standard library, zero pip deps. A self-preservation guard refuses severing actions on units the agent depends on (dbus, logind, sshd, network, tailscaled, the session, goosed) unless force=true. Ships the MCP server plus a control-os skill. The system-service counterpart to screen-mcp's GUI control.

entry.title: claude-env-sync
entry.content: Bidirectional git sync for ~/.claude/ across multiple machines. Go core, vanilla web dashboard, cosign-signed releases.

entry.title: atelier
entry.content: Personal dev workflow plugin — Rust gates, code review, CI, git safety, multi-repo pulse

entry.title: act101
entry.content: AST-aware code transformer for AI agents. 17 MCP tools for code analysis and refactoring across 100+ languages with undo/redo, preview mode, and intelligent guardrails.

entry.title: clodex
entry.content: Claude Code and Codex CLI dual-agent workflow orchestration.

entry.title: holyclaude-cloud
entry.content: Cloud orchestration layer for HolyClaude. Spins up a legion of Claude workers on Modal, each running the full HolyClaude stack, coordinated by a local orchestrator. Decomposes massive coding projects into parallel tasks, dispatches between local subagents and cloud Modal containers, reconciles via GitHub PRs.

entry.title: banthis
entry.content: Persist user-defined banned agent behaviors into CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md

entry.title: avad
entry.content: AI builder plugin — strategy, review, design, QA, security, headless browser, deploy, and retrospectives.

entry.title: adamsreview
entry.content: Multi-lens code review pipeline: deep review (Claude or Codex), automated fix loop, interactive walkthrough, manual promote, external-finding injection.

entry.title: agntux-core
entry.content: Your AgntUX home base. Set up with /agntux onboard, then use /agntux triage every day to see your action items.

entry.title: cliproof
entry.content: Prove your CLI actually works. Captures a real terminal command and its real output as a polished screenshot (or GIF) and embeds it into your README as proof-it-runs evidence.

entry.title: ai-test-failure-analyzer
entry.content: Root cause in seconds. Evidence, not intuition. Analyzes Playwright, Jest, Cypress, Newman, k6, and JUnit test failures by tracing real evidence from git, logs, and config — no guesses, no fixture noise.

entry.title: chonker
entry.content: real-time context window meter showing token usage, rate limits, and remaining capacity

entry.title: agwacom-adeel
entry.content: AI-powered specialist workflows for Claude Code. Use for /adeel:review, /adeel:ship, /adeel:qa, /adeel:browse, /adeel:investigate, /adeel:retro, /adeel:plan-eng-review, /adeel:plan-design-review, /adeel:plan-ceo-review, /adeel:design-consultation, /adeel:design-review, /adeel:autoplan, /adeel:document-release, /adeel:codex, /adeel:qa-only, or /adeel:setup-browser-cookies.

entry.title: avadbot
entry.content: Claude Code skill suite: plan review, code review, shipping, QA testing, debugging, documentation, browser automation, project scaffolding, auto-review pipeline, and engineering retrospectives. Works with any project, any language, any framework. Use for /avad-new, /avad-autoplan, /avad-plan-ceo-review, /avad-plan-eng-review, /avad-review, /avad-ship, /avad-qa, /avad-retro, /avad-debug, /avad-document-release, /avad-help, /avad-browse, or any workflow requiring project scaffolding, automated review pipelines, structured plan review, pre-landing code review, one-command shipping, browser-based QA, systematic debugging, post-ship documentation, skill discovery, or engineering retrospectives.

entry.title: claude-vision
entry.content: Lets Claude Code see — screen captures and webcam frames analyzed by a dedicated subagent, returning a compact textual report.

entry.title: wireframe
entry.content: Create and render wireframes using wiremd — converts Markdown into visual HTML mockups.

entry.title: yukti
entry.content: Token-saving Claude Code plugin: routes work across Haiku/Sonnet/Opus per pipeline stage. Adds session-start brief, opt-in local telemetry with savings dashboard, and advisory routing hints. Composes with built-in CLAUDE.md + auto memory and with claude-mem / code-review-graph.

entry.title: adobe-data-ai
entry.content: Architecture skills for @adobe/data — data-oriented modelling, archetype iteration, hot-path performance, and related conventions.

entry.title: claude-flow
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: mudguard
entry.content: Autonomous, independently-verified architecture deepening — sweep a codebase for deep-module/deletion-test opportunities and file them as vertical-slice issues, headless and delta-aware, over a whole repo or a chosen part.

entry.title: governor
entry.content: Governor: always-on compact professional output, telemetry, context slimming, tool-output filtering, prompt guidance, and drift guardrails for Claude Code Max users.

entry.title: claude-notifications-go
entry.content: Smart notifications for Claude Code task statuses (Go implementation)

entry.title: terminal-title
entry.content: Automatically updates terminal title with emoji + project + topic context

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: The most comprehensive Claude Code plugin — 14+ agents, 56+ skills, 33+ commands, and production-ready hooks for TDD, security scanning, code review, and continuous learning

entry.title: reverse-engineering
entry.content: Binary reverse engineering, malware analysis, firmware security, and software protection research for authorized security research, CTF competitions, and defensive security

entry.title: semgrep
entry.content: Semgrep Guardian: Scans agent-generated code for security vulnerabilities.

entry.title: followrabbit
entry.content: Cloud cost optimization for GCP. Reviews Terraform and SQL files for cost impact using the followrabbit CLI (requires manual install). Data flow disclosed in README.
